title: Samil PwC Becomes First Korean Accounting Firm to Export Internal Control AI Solution
description: Samil PwC has become the first Korean accounting firm to export its self-developed AI-based internal control automation solution to advanced overseas markets, marking a new milestone in Korea's accounting industry.

title: UI professor repairs damaged ancient manuscripts with AI
description: A University of Iowa-led research team is aiming to use AI to restore lost sections of ancient manuscripts, with support from a $500,000 grant from Schmidt Sciences, a philanthropic organization that funds unconventional scientific research. Paul Dilley, the Erling B. “Jack” Holtsmark Associate Professor in the UI’s Classics department and the departmental executive officer of... title: [Opinion] Tiny tokens, big market: how AI usage is powering China's smart economy
